This method prompts the person to select which apps on their device can forward notifications to your accessory. The person can choose all apps, some apps, no apps, or dismiss the prompt. # requestForwarding(for:)

**Instance Method**

Requests permission to forward notifications to the specified accessory.

## Declaration

```swift
func requestForwarding(for accessory: ASAccessory) async throws -> ForwardingDecision
```

## Parameters

- **accessory**: An accessory object that [https://developer.apple.com/documentation/accessorysetupkit] provides when your companion app registers the accessory.

## Discussion

This method prompts the person to select which apps on their device can forward notifications to your accessory. The person can choose all apps, some apps, no apps, or dismiss the prompt. This method throws [doc://com.apple.accessorynotifications/documentation/AccessoryNotifications/AccessoryError/unsupportedPlatform] if called on an unsupported device; notification forwarding supports iPhone only.
